user_query: Give me quote from sun tzu

raw_data.q: Thinking is difficult, that's why most people judge.
raw_data.h:
“Thinking is difficult, that's why most people judge.” —
Carl Jung

processed.quote: Thinking is difficult, that's why most people judge.
processed.author: Carl Jung

final_response: It seems there was a mix-up, as I found a quote by Carl Jung instead of Sun Tzu. A well-known quote from Sun Tzu is, "The greatest victory is that which requires no battle." If you're looking for more insights or specific themes from his work, feel free to ask!
